use_cases: Primary call-to-action button for landing pages and marketing sites
Interactive button for SaaS dashboards and app navigation
CTA element for e-commerce checkout and product pages
Action trigger for dev-tools and developer documentation sites
Animated button for dark-themed portfolio and creative websites
ai_summary: A sophisticated animated button component featuring a dark gradient background with glass-morphism effects. The button includes smooth hover transitions with a white glow effect, an animated shimmer sweep on hover, and a color-shifting dot indicator. Designed for premium dark-themed interfaces where subtle micro-interactions enhance user experience.
